app.title: Should I Run Plain Docker Compose in Production in 2026?
app.author: pmig
app.description: Discussion about using Docker Compose in production
proposed_tests: Install Docker and run a simple compose file
Try to deploy an app with Docker Compose to a test environment
Compare performance between plain Docker Compose and Docker Swarm
